title: PM Modi's meet with CMs LIVE: Excise duty on petrol cut to ₹3 ahead of key meeting with chief ministers
description: PM Modi's meet with CMs LIVE updates: The government of India has cut the special additional excise duties (SAED) on petrol and diesel, in a move seemingly to reduce losses of oil companies. The special excise duty on petrol to ₹3 per litre from ₹13 earlier.
